title: Buttery Chewy Butter Banana Stir-fry
description: A post-workout Filipino dish featuring demerara sugar for added sweetness and chewiness in a butter banana stir-fry that's whole30-friendly and perfect as a snack or dessert.

ingredients.name: unsalted butter
ingredients.notes: melted and added at the end for extra richness

instructions: Melt the unsalted butter in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced banana to the melted butter and sauté until softened, about 3-5 minutes.
Stir in the demerara sugar and cook for an additional minute until the sugar has caramelized slightly.
Season with salt and adjust sweetness by adding more sugar if needed. Serve hot as a snack or dessert.
